payment_terms: Purchaser pays $150,000 as earnest money deposit held in escrow, with the balance of the $5,500,000 purchase price due at closing by wire transfer, subject to adjustments for taxes, production revenues, and costs attributable to periods before and after the effective date.
termination_clauses: By mutual written agreement of both parties
By either party if closing has not occurred by May 15, 2014
By Purchaser if any of Seller's representations or warranties are materially inaccurate
By either party for material breach or failure to perform by the other party
By either party for material error, misstatement or omission of material fact by the other party
By Purchaser pursuant to conditions precedent in Article 7
By Seller pursuant to conditions precedent in Article 8
